## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue (or explained why one isn't needed)
- [ ] Considered whether the fix actually belongs upstream in `olwibaCN/src/docs/components/` (synced files in this repo are overwritten on `bun run sync`)
- [ ] Updated `scripts/sync-from-cn.ts` `SYNC_MAP` if a new docs component was added upstream
- [ ] Ran `bun run types:check` and it passes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes
- [ ] Followed the [contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
